args.description: Command and arguments in argv format.

env.description: Environment variables to set for the subprocess.

identity.description: Reference to a `kind: Identity` resource. Overrides the Sync-level identity for this stage.

timeout.description: Per-step timeout. Overrides the Sync-level `timeout` for this stage.

type.description: Execution type for this step (currently only `Command`).

description:
Spec for `kind: Sync`. Defines convergence operations as a pre/run/post sequence of steps.
Reusable across multiple Assets via `ref`.

identity.description: Reference to a `kind: Identity` resource. Applied to all stages unless overridden per-stage.

post.description: Optional step executed after the main sync command.

pre.description: Optional step executed before the main sync command.

timeout.description:
Sync-wide timeout applied to each step unless overridden.
Falls back to `NagiConfig::default_timeout` when omitted.

title: SyncSpec
